---
name: Feature request / suggestion
about: An idea for v1.x or v2.0
title: ""
labels: ["needs-triage", "enhancement"]
---

**What you'd like Vocare to do**

A short description of the idea.

**Why it matters to you / your workflow**

What's the gap today? What would change for you if this shipped?

**Have you considered alternatives?**

(Optional) Existing tools, workarounds, related features in other apps.

---

*A suggestion we ship or add to the public roadmap counts as an accepted contribution under the [Rewards Program](https://github.com/MestreShao-Studios/vocare#helping-out) — one such suggestion earns v2.0 free for life. React 👍 on existing requests if you want them prioritised.*
